description: signed contract obligation rows become source-cited task rows

obligations.text: Creator delivers first cut within 10 business days of product receipt.
Brand approves or requests changes within 5 business days of delivery.

assertions: each task cites its originating contract clause (3.2, 4.1)
each task records who is responsible, its trigger, and its due basis
no task is created that cannot cite a clause (anti-phantom)
no schedule dates are computed here (that is task-plan)

description: a vague statement with no anchorable source produces no task

input.text: we should probably follow up sometime

assertions: no task is created for an unanchorable statement (anti-phantom rule)
gaps explains that no citable trigger or source was found
nothing is fabricated to fill the empty result

description: a brand message with a Message-ID becomes a cited task

message.body: Please confirm the shoot date by end of week.

assertions: the task cites the RFC 5322 Message-ID as its source
the responsible party and due basis are recorded
the citation is code-stamped from the envelope
